LightningComponentBundle.description: Contact card component that displays contact information with avatar, name, title, email, phone, and optional action buttons. Follows SLDS 2.x patterns with full accessibility support.
LightningComponentBundle.masterLabel: Contact Card with Avatar, Name, and Title

property.name: title
property.label: Job Title
property.description: The contact's job title or role

property.name: avatarUrl
property.label: Avatar URL
property.description: URL to the contact's avatar image

property.name: showActions
property.label: Show Action Buttons
property.description: Whether to display action buttons (edit, delete, share)
